module:
Boundary provider implementation for linguistic processing.

This module provides an implementation of the BoundaryProvider interface
using linguistic analysis to identify natural boundaries in text.

LinguisticBoundaryProvider.docstring: Boundary provider using linguistic processing to identify boundaries.

__init__.docstring:
Initialize the boundary provider.
        
        Args:
            processor_type: Type of linguistic processor to use
            **options: Additional options for the processor

capabilities.docstring: Get capabilities of this boundary provider.

get_boundaries.docstring:
Get text boundaries using linguistic processing.
        
        Args:
            text: Text to analyze
            boundary_types: Types of boundaries to detect
            **options: Additional options for boundary detection
            
        Returns:
            List of ChunkingBoundary objects
